title: eria kalabakanensis
intro: Eria kalabakanensis is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Borneo, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and exhibit antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eria kalabakanensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its antioxidant properties that may help protect against oxidative stress. Eria kalabakanensis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
